男生身高.description: Heights of 18 male students sampled; the answer uses the sample mean (70 inches) and sample size (18) to compute the z test statistic.

总体均值.description: Known average height of men in the general population (69 inches), used as the hypothesized value μ₀ in the z-test.

总体标准差.description: Known population standard deviation (σ = 2.8 inches) used in computing the z test statistic.
